## Checklist

- [ ] `.build/release/CleanShotZ --selftest-project` passes locally
- [ ] No new external Swift dependencies
- [ ] No network calls / analytics added (on-device only)
- [ ] New pure logic (codec / geometry / stitching / OCR) has self-test coverage
- [ ] Verified the affected flow in the running app (describe how below)
